title: Our Love Story
content:
Our story began quietly, through a simple connection between family and work. What started as casual conversations soon turned into late-night chats and shared laughter.

A brave decision to finally meet led to five months of courtship—filled with patience, sincerity, and growing certainty. On September 28, 2024, we chose each other.

Our journey was not always easy. There were doubts, resistance, and moments when love was questioned by the voices around us. There were times when loving felt like fighting.

But instead of breaking us, those challenges strengthened our bond. Bitoy chose love—again and again—and together, we stood firm when it would have been easier to walk away.

What we built was tested, proven, and refined. Now, with hearts fuller and faith stronger, we look forward to forever—and to the day we make it official.

On April 18, 2026, we say "I do"—not because love was easy, but because it was worth everything. That is our promise to each other.
